title: Curation-QA / extraction-faithfulness audit harness
context: The curation-QA harness samples shipped assertions and checks each faithfully represents its cited source, reporting a faithfulness rate and routing failures to re-review. Binding cancer guardrails apply: only open-access / aggregate / de-identified sources (controlled-access - dbGaP, EGA, individual-level biobanks - and any identifiable patient data are out of scope); per-source license verified before reuse (COSMIC/OncoKB cite-only, CIViC CC0, DepMap CC-BY, ClinVar public domain, PMC-OA per-article); no-source-no-claim provenance on every assertion. No partner/reviewer/steward is yet secured, so this task carries requestor 'TO BE SECURED' and verifiedNeed false.
objective: Build the curation-QA / extraction-faithfulness audit harness that samples shipped assertions, checks each faithfully represents its cited source (no overstatement), reports a faithfulness rate, and routes failures to re-review.
acceptanceCriteria: Samples shipped assertions and checks each faithfully represents its cited source (no overstatement); reports a faithfulness rate; target >= 95%, with failures routed to re-review
